title: oedochloa minarum
intro: Oedochloa minarum, also known as Minah bird grass or Minah bird grass clump, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oedochloa minarum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Oedochloa minarum can be made into tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
